raw.raw_text: Every ~15 minutes I get kicked back to the login screen while working in the dashboard. Super frustrating because I lose my query state. Happens on Chrome and Safari, both incognito and regular. Observed: redirected to /login with no warning. Expected: session stays active while I am actively using the app.

rationale: The issue affects the user_auth critical path, which has a severity floor of S1.
Users are kicked out of the session every 15 minutes, causing disruption and loss of work state.
The problem impacts user experience significantly as users can't maintain continuous workflow without interruption.
specialist_opinions.impact_summary: Users are disrupted frequently by being logged out unexpectedly, impacting their workflow.

rationale: The user gets redirected to the login screen every ~15 minutes, indicating a potential authentication or session management issue ('auth').
The user reports losing their query state upon being logged out, which indicates potential data loss ('data_loss').
specialist_opinions.escalation_reason: User experiences forced logout, potentially due to session expiry, causing loss of application state.

rationale: The reproduction_steps field is missing, which hinders the ability to reliably reproduce the issue.
The expected_result and observed_result are stated, but without clear steps to reproduce, it limits how one could act on the report.
